response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software engineering and geospatial data projects (e.g., GISCollective), but lacks direct experience with modern C++ or Rust for routing/tiling pipelines. Their expertise in Dlang, TypeScript, and Node.js is impressive but not aligned with the primary technologies required. Their problem-solving approach and willingness to learn are positives, but the gap in core competencies raises concerns.
strengths: Strong experience with geospatial data processing (GISCollective, Green Map Association)
Proven ability to build and optimize distributed systems (Dunnhumby, Optilyz)
Demonstrated track record of learning new technologies and frameworks rapidly
concerns: No direct experience with C++ or Rust, which are primary requirements for this role
Limited exposure to routing/tiling systems or navigation data pipelines
Heavy focus on web/mobile development rather than low-latency, high-performance data processing
